tagline: Pool Repair and Cleaning. We Got You Covered.

hero.headline: Your Pool, Cared for by the Owner
hero.subheadline: When you hire Clean & Brite Pools, you get Debbie and Dan — the owners — personally cleaning, repairing, and maintaining your pool every single visit. No subcontractors, no rotating crews, just 11 years of hands-on expertise dedicated to your backyard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> People Who Know Your Pool
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repair, every service is performed personally by the owner. That means consistent quality, real accountability, and a pool that always looks its best.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Full-service weekly maintenance starting at $150/month. Water testing, chemical balancing, equipment inspection, brushing, vacuuming, and detailed onsite records — every visit.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Deep cleaning of D.E. and cartridge filters, recommended 1-3 times per year. Full disassembly, thorough cleaning, and O-ring inspection to keep filtration at peak performance.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and more — the owner personally diagnoses every issue and completes the repair. No middlemen, no guesswork, just quality workmanship.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Professional-grade shock treatments, stabilizer, algaecides, and phosphate removers applied with precision to keep your water safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin.

cards.title: Equipment Parts & Replacement
cards.description: Skimmer baskets, pump baskets, gaskets, and other essential components sourced and installed to prevent damage and keep your pool systems running smoothly.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Care
cards.description: Arizona pools need year-round attention. We adjust chemical treatments, inspect equipment, and adapt our service to handle monsoon season, summer heat, and everything in between.

steps.title: Call Debbie or Dan
steps.description: Reach out directly to the owners. We'll discuss your pool's needs, schedule a free evaluation, and give you an honest, no-pressure quote — usually the same day.

steps.title: The Owner Services Your Pool
steps.description: No random technicians. Dan arrives on schedule with CPO-certified expertise, performs a thorough cleaning, balances your chemistry, and inspects all equipment personally.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready week after week. Any costs over $25 are discussed before invoicing — no surprises, just a pool you can trust.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: We're Not a Big Company — We're Your Neighbors
about.description: Clean & Brite Pools is a family-owned, owner-operated pool service based right here in Sun City, Arizona. Debbie and Dan started this business over a decade ago with one simple belief: pool service should be personal. When you call, you talk to the owner. When we arrive, the owner cleans your pool. With CPO certification, TSA background clearance, and a limited client roster, we give every pool the attention it deserves.

features.title: TSA Background Checked
features.description: Your safety matters. Both owners have passed TSA background checks for complete peace of mind when we're on your property.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, Always
features.description: Any cost exceeding $25 is discussed with you before it appears on your invoice. No hidden fees, no surprise line items.

features.title: Limited Client Roster
features.description: We intentionally keep our client list small so every pool gets the personal attention and thorough care it deserves — no rushing, no cutting corners.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Weekly full-service maintenance starting at $150/month. Any additional costs over $25 are always discussed with you first.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with a service visit, call us directly and we'll come back to make it right — no extra charge, no questions asked. We keep our client list small for a reason: so we can give your pool the attention it deserves, every single time.

faqs.question: Who actually cleans my pool?
faqs.answer: The owner — Dan — personally services every pool on our roster. No subcontractors, no rotating crews. When you hire Clean & Brite, you get the same experienced, CPO-certified professional every single visit.

faqs.question: What does weekly service include?
faqs.answer: Complete water testing, chemical balancing, equipment inspection, O-ring lubrication, filter backwashing, basket and trap emptying, brushing of steps, benches, tile and walls, vacuuming, and detailed onsite service records. Starting at $150/month.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden fees or surprise charges?
faqs.answer: Never. Any cost exceeding $25 — whether for specialty chemicals, parts, or repairs — is discussed with you and approved before it ever appears on your invoice. Transparency is how we do business.

faqs.question: Do you serve areas outside Sun City?
faqs.answer: We serve Sun City, Sun City West, and the surrounding Northwest Phoenix metro area. We keep our service area focused so we can maintain the quality and personal attention our clients expect.

faqs.question: How often should my filter be cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend D.E. and cartridge filter cleanings 1-3 times per year depending on usage. Sand filters need media replacement every 5-7 years. We'll monitor your filter's performance and let you know when it's time.

testimonials.name: Thomas P.
testimonials.text: Clean & Brite is our weekly and trusted pool maintenance service. Dan showed us everything and explained the process during our filter cleaning. Took before and after pictures. Highly recommend this family owned business for weekly maintenance or any pool needs.

testimonials.name: Terry H.
testimonials.text: This is the best pool service we've ever had. They are on top of everything. The owner is the one who does the service so you don't have to worry about turnover.

testimonials.name: Brian N.
testimonials.text: I have had the pleasure of working with Dan and Clean & Brite Pools for almost two years. They couldn't be nicer or more knowledgeable. They go out of their way to do the job quickly and correctly, and follow up every time to ensure you're happy.
